title: Why was Tucker Carlson fired and what was he worth to Fox Corp?
text: Fox Corp (NASDAQ: FOX) remains in focus a day after firing its top-rated primetime host – Tucker Carlson as Invezz reported HERE. Why did Fox Corp part ways with Tucker Carlson?

title: Tucker Carlson out at Fox News after $787M Dominion defamation settlement; News Corp shares fall
text: News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS) shares took a brief tumble Monday afternoon after Fox News Media announced that Tucker Carlson would be parting ways with the company.  Carlson is Fox New's most-watched anchor, with this 8 pm time slot drawing an average of 3.25 million viewers in the first quarter of 2023.

title: What was Tucker Carlson worth to Fox News? About $650 million, according to Wall Street.
text: What was Tucker Carlson worth to Fox News?

title: Tucker Carlson's Exit Wipes Out $700 Million In Market Value For Fox
text: It's the latest headwind for the cable giant after it agreed to pay nearly $800 million to settle a defamation lawsuit for its coverage of fraud during the 2020 election.

title: Fox Stock Tumbles as Tucker Carlson to Leave Fox News
text: Fox Corp. stock was falling Monday after the media giant announced primetime television host Tucker Carlson was leaving the station.

title: Fox: Not Too Late To Dump It
text: Fox: Not Too Late To Dump It.

title: Will Fox (FOXA) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Fox (FOXA) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Magnitude Of Fox Settlement Takes Wall Street By Surprise – But It Is Tax Deductible
text: Fox looks set to weather a massive payout to settle its case with Dominion Voting System. It has $4 billion in cash and generates significant free cash flow annually. The $787.5 million hit, one of the largest defamation settlements ever, isn't likely to disturb Fox News profits.

title: Fox faces similar defamation case from Smartmatic after Dominion settlement
text: Smartmatic wants to compel Fox to "reproduce all relevant documents and depositions from the Dominion actions."

title: Fox Settles Dominion Suit, but Smartmatic Case and Others Loom
text: Another election technology company, Smartmatic, is suing news outlets, including Fox, over false claims of election fraud, and Dominion has other cases pending.

title: Defamation suit settlement will hold Fox accountable for election claims, Dominion negotiator says
text: Hootan Yaghoobzadeh, the co-founder of Staple Street Capital and negotiator on the settlement deal with Fox, said his team feels "good" about the agreement.

title: Why Fox News' Next Defamation Suit—From Smartmatic—Might Require Another ‘Big Check' To Settle
text: After Dominion accepted a settlement offer, Smartmatic is moving forward with a $2.7 billion lawsuit against Fox News, its anchors and Rudy Giuliani.

title: Fox Just Settled With Dominion. The Stock Market Was Never Worried.
text: Fox Corp agreed to a large settlement to end a lawsuit. Even as the saga unveiled the company's inner workings, viewers and investors stuck by Fox.

title: Elon Musk Dishes On Google And OpenAI Over AI Wars On Fox News
text: The world's wealthiest people are drawing battle lines when it comes to controlling AI, according to Elon Musk in his Arpil 16 to 17 interview with Tucker Carlson on Fox News. Musk details his rift with Google cofounder Larry Page over founding OpenAI and his plans for his new AI company.

title: Fox Will Pay $787.5 Million to Settle Dominion Defamation Suit
text: The settlement with Dominion Voting Systems was the latest extraordinary twist in a case that exposed the inner workings of the most powerful voice in conservative news.

title: Fox News Settles Dominion Defamation Case For $787.5 Million, Dominion Lawyer Says
text: Dominion Voting Systems has settled its defamation lawsuit against Fox News in a last-minute move Tuesday, Delaware Superior Court Judge Eric Davis announced, resolving one of the most high-profile defamation cases in recent history.

title: Fox and Dominion settle for $787.5m in defamation lawsuit over election lies
text: Agreement reached after the jury was sworn in on Tuesday morning after lengthy delay to start of opening statements

title: Fox News and Dominion settle election defamation lawsuit, judge says
text: The settlement between Fox Corp. and Dominion Voting Systems came as opening arguments in a Delaware court were delayed for hours amid speculation about talks.

title: Fox News and Dominion trial kicks off with opening statements in defamation suit
text: Dominion has accused Fox of "intentionally and falsely" blaming it for former President Donald Trump's loss to President Joe Biden.

title: Dominion defamation lawsuit against Fox News delayed
text: Dominion Voting Systems' $1.6 billion defamation lawsuit against Fox News has been delayed on the eve of its scheduled start date, an official for the court hearing the case said.

title: Fox News apologizes to judge in defamation case for failing to disclose Rupert Murdoch's role at the network
text: Fox News apologizes to judge in defamation case for failing to disclose Rupert Murdoch's role at the network

title: Fox's (FOXA) Outkick Signs Multi-Year Contract With Dan Dakich
text: Fox's (FOXA) Outkick announces signing of a multi-year agreement with Dan Dakich as the host.

title: What Dominion's lawsuit could mean for Fox and its cable TV networks
text: Dominion Voting System's defamation lawsuit against Fox Corp. and its cable TV networks will go to trial on Monday.

title: Fox (FOXA) Streaming Service to Release New Series on Apr 24
text: Fox's (FOXA) streaming service, FOX Nation announces the release of a new series The Real Hatfields & McCoys: Forever Feuding, on Apr 24.
